title: Nursery-linked habitat memory phase
summary: Sixty-first structured packet for Eco Explorer. This lane-2 wave ties a few remembered habitats more meaningfully into the nursery through current note and memory seams, without turning the nursery into a larger system.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the nursery-linked habitat memory handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The nursery is best when it quietly echoes discovered places instead of growing bigger systems.
A place-linked memory thread can make the nursery feel more emotionally grounded.
The nursery must stay secondary and calm.

execution_order.goal: Prepare one compact second habitat-memory follow-on.
execution_order.why_now: One additional thread can reinforce the idea without turning into a broader feature.
A small follow-on can make the nursery support loop feel warmer and more personal.
The result should stay small and non-managerial.

guardrails: Do not add more nursery management.
Do not add another nursery page or grid.
Reuse current note, sketchbook, close-look, and quiet nursery-support seams.
acceptance_focus: The nursery feels more tied to discovered habitats.
The result stays small and emotionally warm.
Lane 2 deepens memory without system growth.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-2.md, docs/reports/2026-04-02-nursery-linked-habitat-memory-phase.md, and this packet. Treat this as lane 2's next long-push wave after the middle-habitat comparison pass: tie a few remembered habitats more meaningfully into the nursery without expanding the nursery shell or management loop.
